summary: Iteration 74: Testing 3 New Barcode Features - All backend APIs (12/12) passed. Frontend features verified: Barcode Management page, Print Barcodes with Load from Inventory button, Linked Scanner system with QR code dialog all working correctly.

issues: Console warning: Duplicate key errors for retail/wholesale/special price scheme keys - cosmetic issue, does not affect functionality

FEATURE_1_BARCODE_MANAGE_PAGE.description: Barcode Management page at /barcode-manage with tabs
tests: Page loads with correct heading 'Barcode Management'
data-testid='barcode-manage-page' present
Tab 'No Barcode (0)' - shows 0 products without barcodes
Tab 'With Barcode (67)' - shows 67 products with barcodes
Barcode preview SVG displayed for each product
Search functionality filters products correctly

FEATURE_2_PRINT_BARCODES_LOAD_INVENTORY.description: Print Barcodes page with Load from Inventory button
tests: Page loads at /barcode-print with correct heading
Label size selector present with 40x30mm (Default) and 50x30mm options
Add All Products button present
Load from Inventory button present with data-testid='load-inventory-btn'
Load from Inventory API /products/barcode-inventory/{branch_id} works correctly

FEATURE_3_LINKED_SCANNER_SYSTEM.description: Linked Phone Scanner - Desktop QR code, phone connects via WebSocket
tests: Link Scanner button visible on Sales page (/sales-new)
Link Scanner button creates scanner session (POST /api/scanner/create-session)
QR code dialog opens with scanner URL
Session validation endpoint works (GET /api/scanner/session/{id})
Close session endpoint works (POST /api/scanner/close-session/{id})
Invalid session returns 404, closed session returns 410
Mobile scanner page at /scanner/{sessionId} is NOT auth-protected (by design)
Mobile scanner shows error for invalid/expired sessions

FEATURE_4_SIDEBAR_LINKS.description: Sidebar has Print Barcodes and Barcode Manager links
tests: Print Barcodes link present with data-testid='nav-barcode-print'
Barcode Manager link present with data-testid='nav-barcode-manage'

test_categories: Scanner Session APIs (5 tests): create-session, get-session, invalid-session-404, close-session, closed-session-410
Barcode Management APIs (4 tests): list-products, bulk-generate, single-generate, search-by-barcode
Barcode Lookup APIs (2 tests): lookup-found, lookup-not-found

critical_code_review_comments: Scanner sessions use in-memory storage with DB backup for persistence
WebSocket endpoints at /api/scanner/ws/desktop/{id} and /api/scanner/ws/phone/{id} not directly testable via HTTP
Mobile scanner page at /scanner/{sessionId} is correctly unprotected for phone access
React key warning on Sales page (duplicate keys for price schemes) - minor cosmetic issue
Branch 1 in test had no inventory with barcodes - Load from Inventory correctly returned empty list
seed_data_creation: None - used existing products with auto-generated barcodes
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 74 verified 3 new barcode features: (1) Barcode Management page at /barcode-manage with No Barcode/With Barcode tabs - correctly shows 0 and 67 counts, (2) Print Barcodes page at /barcode-print has Load from Inventory button which calls /products/barcode-inventory/{branch_id} API, (3) Linked Scanner system - Sales page has Link Scanner button that creates session via POST /scanner/create-session, shows QR dialog, mobile page at /scanner/{id} validates session. WebSocket functionality not directly testable but REST APIs work correctly. All 67 parent products have AG-prefixed barcodes.
